goal: Demonstrate how scope drift escalates from report-only evidence to strict policy attention when high-risk assurance is selected.
scope: Synthetic scenario fixture only; no production payment, settlement, or schema behavior is changed.

assumptions.text: The high-risk lane in this scenario is illustrative and uses fixture-only changed files.
Boundary Map drift remains report-only unless risk:high / enforce-assurance or critical-core policy selects enforcement.

rollbackPlan: Revert the fixture, generator, docs, and tests added for the scope drift scenario.
requiredHumanInput: Reviewer disposition for accepting or rejecting the out-of-scope payment settlement helper change.
Human approval before treating the high-risk strict lane as merge-ready.
notes: This plan artifact is an expected fixture for the high-risk policy summary, not a live PR plan artifact.
